commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair job is needed; this maintainer-labeled PR has no actionable review findings and should proceed through normal maintainer checks.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression found; the protocol relaxation is limited to probe-mode handshakes and still goes through the existing auth path. (sha=42f25b56b36255e41ca4ea843597e64d2556d87c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR lowers the gateway probe protocol floor to v3, adds probe-only previous-protocol tests, emits a split shell/service root warning during package updates, and updates docs plus changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main's restart health path uses probeGateway, while the server still requires probe clients to support protocol v4, so a v3 updater probing a v4 gateway would hit protocol mismatch. I did not run a live package-update restart in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair job is needed; this maintainer-labeled PR has no actionable review findings and should proceed through normal maintainer checks.

target.title: Fix update restart health across protocol skew
target.body:
Summary:
- Allow CLI probe-mode restart health checks from the previous Gateway protocol version while keeping normal clients on the current protocol floor.
- Warn during `openclaw update` when the shell CLI root differs from the managed Gateway service root, so split installs like PATH vs service package root are visible.
- Document the probe compatibility floor and add the user-facing changelog note.

Verification:
- `pnpm test src/gateway/server.auth.default-token.test.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/protocol/version.ts src/gateway/server.auth.default-token.suite.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm changed:lanes --json`
target.author: amknight
